## Description

## Type of change

<!-- Delete the lines that don't apply. -->

- Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing tool contracts)
- Documentation only
- Refactoring / internal change (no behavior change)

## How was this tested?

<!--
The project follows TDD: production-code changes must come with tests written
first (RED → GREEN → REFACTOR). Describe the tests that cover this change.
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change, and `poetry run pytest -q` passes
- [ ] `poetry run ruff check .` reports no issues
- [ ] New dependencies (if any) added to **both** `pyproject.toml` and `requirements.txt`
- [ ] New/changed tools are reflected in the README tool catalog and schemas docs
- [ ] Comments, docstrings, and documentation are in English
